title: A jacketed heat-retaining vessel
abstract: A jacketed heat-retaining vessel comprising: a pre-designed heat-retention jacket configured to envelope a vessel, characterised in that, said heat-retention jacket comprising embedded heat delivery mechanisms in order to provide heat to said enveloped vessel; and said jacket comprises at least one layer of insulating material and at least one layer of radiation reflective material alternatively interspersed along a radially outward direction from the vessel centre.
claims: Claims CLAIMS, 1. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel comprising: - a pre-designed heat-retention jacket configured to envelope a vessel, characterised in that, said heat-retention jacket comprising embedded heat delivery mechanisms in order to provide heat to said enveloped vessel; and - said jacket comprises at least one layer of insulating material and at least one layer of radiation reflective material alternatively interspersed along a radially outward direction from the vessel centre. 2. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket comprising a plurality of sheets of radiation reflective material in concentric configuration with respect to said vessel. 3. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket comprising a plurality of sheets of radiation reflective material in a spiral configuration with respect to said vessel. 4. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said radiation reflecting layer being formed in a continuous series of loops in a layered form about a cylindrical axis of said vessel. 5. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said radiation reflecting layer being formed in a non-continuous series of loops in a layered form about a cylindrical axis of said vessel. 6. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said insulating layer being formed in a continuous series of loops in a layered forms about a cylindrical axis of said vessel. 1 7. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said insulating layer being formed in a non-continuous series of loops in a layered forms about a cylindrical axis of said vessel. 8. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket is a passive heat-retaining jacket. 9. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket comprises multiple layers of insulating material with radiation reflective layers interspersed between said insulating materials. 10. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket comprises at least one layer of insulating material and at least one layer of radiation reflective material, characterised in that, said radiation reflective layer is any reflective layer. 11. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel comprising a bottom shield for said pre-designed heat-retention jacket which covers said embedded induction coils. 12. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel comprising a bottom shield for said pre-designed heat-retention jacket which covers an energy source configured to deliver heat. 13. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel comprising a top thermal shield. 2 14. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel comprising a side thermal shield. 15. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel comprising a box comprising a connector attaching to said jacket, said connector carrying sensing probes to allow accurate control of energy injection process, thereby increasing efficiencies and the convenience of operation. 16. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket is a solar thermal pre-designed heat retention jacket. 17. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket is a vacuum thermal pre-designed heat retention jacket. 18. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket is a mylar sheet jacket. 19. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said jacket comprising sensing mechanisms selected from a group of mechanisms consisting of thermocouple temperature sensing mechanisms, infrared sensors, pressure sensors, resistance sensors. 20. A jacketed heat-retaining vessel as claimed in claim 1 wherein, said vessel being communicably coupled to at least a heat delivery mechanism, said heat delivery mechanism being selected from a group of mechanisms consisting of a conductive heat delivery mechanism, a convective heat delivery mechanism, a radiative heat delivery mechanism, and a generative heat delivery mechanism. 3
